response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r1c2 is 0.10 below threshold (SoC ~0.25), meets urgent criteria, and my 3.5 kW capacity safely covers their 0.5 kWh request while maintaining my 35% SoC floor under balanced sharing policy.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.35, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Five peers in critical danger; dr_aggregator is coordinating; I can safely share 3.5 kW per tick while maintaining 35% SoC floor for my own 7.5-hour survival..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
